rationale: The citing paper explicitly analyzes “spillovers and substitution across channels” (fake-news referrals, direct visits, regular ads), while the cited paper’s core contribution is a formal model and evidence of spillover dynamics in paid search (generic to branded). That thematic overlap makes the cited work a plausible conceptual/mechanism source rather than an obviously incidental mention, even though the raw evidence here is only a DOI-level match without in-text context.
